languages.text: "Дайте мне шанс доказать мои навыки, и я его не упущу, почитаемый спаситель полка". {n}В звонком голосе Ведки появились новые, слегка безумные нотки.{/n} "Разрешите удалиться".
"Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}A new, slightly manic note creeps into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"
languages.original_text: "Дайте мне шанс доказать мои навыки, и я его не упущу, почитаемый спаситель полка". {n}В звонком голосе Ведки появились новые, слегка безумные нотки.{/n} "Разрешите удалиться".

traits.locale_text: "Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}New, slightly manic notes creep into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed."
"Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}New, slightly manic notes creep into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed."
"Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}A new, slightly manic note creeps into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"
"Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}A new, slightly manic note creeps into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

languages.text: "Gebt mir eine Chance, meine Fähigkeiten unter Beweis zu stellen, und ich werde sie nicht vergeuden, {mf|ehrenhafter Retter|ehrenhafte Retterin} des Regiments." {n}Eine neue, leicht manische Note schleicht sich in Vedkas klangvolle Stimme.{/n} "Darf ich abtreten?"
languages.original_text: "Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}A new, slightly manic note creeps into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: "Gebt mir eine Chance, meine Fähigkeiten unter Beweis zu stellen, und ich werde sie nicht vergeuden, {mf|ehrenhafter Retter|ehrenhafte Retterin} des Regiments." {n}Eine neue, leicht manische Note schleicht sich in Vedkas klangvolle Stimme.{/n} "Darf ich abtreten?"

languages.text: « Laissez-moi une chance de faire mes preuves, et vous ne le regretterez pas, noble sauveur du régiment. » {n}La voix de Vedka a soudain pris un ton légèrement frénétique.{/n} « M'autorisez-vous à prendre congé ? »
languages.original_text: "Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}A new, slightly manic note creeps into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: « Laissez-moi une chance de faire mes preuves, et vous ne le regretterez pas, noble sauveur du régiment. » {n}La voix de Vedka a soudain pris un ton légèrement frénétique.{/n} « M'autorisez-vous à prendre congé ? »

languages.text: «Deme una ocasión de demostrarle mis habilidades y no le decepcionaré, honorable salvador del regimiento». {n}Notas un nuevo tono frenético en la voz de Vedka.{/n} «¿Puedo retirarme?».
languages.original_text: "Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}A new, slightly manic note creeps into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: «Deme una ocasión de demostrarle mis habilidades y no le decepcionaré, honorable salvador del regimiento». {n}Notas un nuevo tono frenético en la voz de Vedka.{/n} «¿Puedo retirarme?».

languages.text: "Bana yeteneklerimi kanıtlama şansı verin, boşa çıkarmayacağım saygıdeğer alay kurtarıcısı." {n}Vedka'nın çınlayan sesine yeni, çılgınca bir ton sızıyor.{/n} "İzninizle gidebilir miyim?"
languages.original_text: "Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}A new, slightly manic note creeps into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: "Bana yeteneklerimi kanıtlama şansı verin, boşa çıkarmayacağım saygıdeğer alay kurtarıcısı." {n}Vedka'nın çınlayan sesine yeni, çılgınca bir ton sızıyor.{/n} "İzninizle gidebilir miyim?"

languages.text: “给我一个证明自己的机会，我绝不会浪费，尊敬的军团救星。”{n}薇德卡那洪亮的声音里，渗入一丝略显疯狂的兴奋。{/n}“我可以退下了吗？”
languages.original_text: "Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}A new, slightly manic note creeps into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"

traits.locale_text: “给我一个证明自己的机会，我绝不会浪费，尊敬的军团救星。”{n}薇德卡那洪亮的声音里，渗入一丝略显疯狂的兴奋。{/n}“我可以退下了吗？”

languages.text: 「私の腕前を証明する機会を与えてください。私はそれを無駄にすることは決してありません、尊敬する連隊の救世主。」{n}ヴェドカの澄んだ声が、わずかに狂気じみたトーンを帯びる。{/n}「失礼いたします。」
languages.original_text: "Give me a chance to prove my skills, and I shall not waste it, honoured saviour of the regiment." {n}A new, slightly manic note creeps into Vedka's ringing voice.{/n} "May I be dismissed?"
